---
title: "SimCRC Chile — Calibration Results"
subtitle: "Adenoma Model (Female) · v0.13.0 · April 6, 2026"
author: "SimCRC team"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: default
    css: simcrc.css
    slide-number: true
    progress: false
    transition: fade
    incremental: true
    include-after-body: sidebar.html
    navigation-mode: linear
    controls-layout: edges
    embed-resources: true
    width: 1400
    height: 900
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
lang: en
---

## Calibration Overview

**Model:** SimCRC — Adenoma (Female), Chilean population

**Version:** v0.13.0 · Calibrated April 6, 2026

**Method:** BayCANN (Bayesian Calibration with Artificial Neural Networks)

::: incremental
- Priors derived from the **US model**, adjusted per Nicolas' suggestions
- Modified parameters: `alpha_lesion_adenoma`, hazard rates, preclinical-to-clinical detection probabilities
- Calibration targets from **Chilean epidemiological data**
- **4 MCMC chains** used for posterior sampling
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Prior Ranges — Chile vs USA {.smaller}

![](../outputs/BayCANN_versions/Chile/Adenoma/F/v0.13.0/v0.13.0.20260406.1214/fig_priors_Chile_vs_USA_v0.13.0_Adenoma_F.png){fig-align="center" width="95%"}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Posterior Distributions — Chile vs USA {.smaller}

![](../outputs/BayCANN_versions/Chile/Adenoma/F/v0.13.0/v0.13.0.20260406.1214/fig_posteriors_Chile_vs_USA_v0.13.0_Adenoma_F.png){fig-align="center" width="95%"}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Calibration Targets — Numerical (Chile vs USA) {.smaller}

![](../figs/SimCRC_CH_NUM_targets.png){fig-align="center" width="95%"}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Calibration Targets — Categorical (Chile vs USA) {.smaller}

![](../figs/SimCRC_CH_CAT_targets.png){fig-align="center" width="90%"}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Coverage Analysis — Numerical Targets {.smaller}

LHS coverage for CRC incidence (overall, proximal, distal, rectal), adenoma prevalence (0–3+ lesions), and preclinical prevalence.

![](../outputs/BayCANN_versions/Chile/Adenoma/F/v0.13.0/v0.13.0.20260406.1214/fig_coverage_num_SimCRC_v0.13.0.20260406.1214_Adenoma_F_v4.png){fig-align="center" width="90%"}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Coverage Analysis — Categorical Targets {.smaller}

LHS coverage for stage distribution and size distribution by location (proximal, distal, rectal).

![](../outputs/BayCANN_versions/Chile/Adenoma/F/v0.13.0/v0.13.0.20260406.1214/fig_coverage_cat_SimCRC_v0.13.0.20260406.1214_Adenoma_F_v4.png){fig-align="center" width="85%"}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## ANN Prediction Performance

Neural network predicted vs. actual model outputs across all calibration targets.

![](../outputs/BayCANN_versions/Chile/Adenoma/F/v0.13.0/v0.13.0.20260406.1214/fig_ANN_prediction_performance_SimCRC_v0.13.0.20260406.1214_Adenoma_F.png){fig-align="center" width="85%"}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Prior vs Posterior Distributions

Comparison of prior (purple) and posterior (gold) distributions for all calibrated parameters.

![](../outputs/BayCANN_versions/Chile/Adenoma/F/v0.13.0/v0.13.0.20260406.1214/fig_prior-vs-posterior_SimCRC_v0.13.0.20260406.1214_Adenoma_F.png){fig-align="center" width="95%"}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Posterior Distribution by Chain

Chain-level posterior densities — checking convergence across the 4 MCMC chains.

![](../outputs/BayCANN_versions/Chile/Adenoma/F/v0.13.0/v0.13.0.20260406.1214/fig_posterior_distribution_chains_SimCRC_v0.13.0.20260406.1214_Adenoma_F.png){fig-align="center" width="95%"}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Internal Validation — Numerical Targets {.smaller}

Posterior validation for CRC incidence and adenoma prevalence targets across age.

![](../outputs/BayCANN_versions/Chile/Adenoma/F/v0.13.0/v0.13.0.20260406.1214/fig_internal_validation_SimCRC_v0.13.0.20260406.1214_Adenoma_F_num.png){fig-align="center" width="90%"}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Internal Validation — Categorical Targets {.smaller}

Posterior validation for size distribution and stage distribution targets.

![](../outputs/BayCANN_versions/Chile/Adenoma/F/v0.13.0/v0.13.0.20260406.1214/fig_internal_validation_SimCRC_v0.13.0.20260406.1214_Adenoma_F_cat.png){fig-align="center" width="85%"}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Internal Validation by Chain {.smaller}

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
![](../outputs/BayCANN_versions/Chile/Adenoma/F/v0.13.0/v0.13.0.20260406.1214/fig_internal_validation_SimCRC_v0.13.0.20260406.1214_Adenoma_F_num_by_chain.png){fig-align="center" height="90%"}
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](../outputs/BayCANN_versions/Chile/Adenoma/F/v0.13.0/v0.13.0.20260406.1214/fig_internal_validation_SimCRC_v0.13.0.20260406.1214_Adenoma_F_cat_by_chain.png){fig-align="center" height="90%"}
:::
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Calibrated Parameter Set — Numerical (Min Absolute Error) {.smaller}

![](../outputs/BayCANN_versions/Chile/Adenoma/F/v0.13.0/v0.13.0.20260406.1214/fig_internal_validation_SimCRC_v0.13.0.20260406.1214_Adenoma_F_num_Min_AbsolutErr.png){fig-align="center" width="90%"}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Calibrated Parameter Set — Categorical (Min Absolute Error) {.smaller}

![](../outputs/BayCANN_versions/Chile/Adenoma/F/v0.13.0/v0.13.0.20260406.1214/fig_internal_validation_SimCRC_v0.13.0.20260406.1214_Adenoma_F_cat_Min_AbsolutErr.png){fig-align="center" width="85%"}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## C++ and SimCRC-R Validation {.smaller}

Validation of C++ and SimCRC-R natural history versions — Chile (v0.13.0) vs USA (v0.12.0), minimum MAE parameter set (Female, 3rd).

![](../outputs/BayCANN_versions/Chile/Adenoma/F/v0.13.0/v0.13.0.20260406.1214/validation_cpp_r_Chile_USA_v0.13.0_MAE_f_3rd.png){fig-align="center" width="95%"}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Screening Cost Update — v2 vs v3 (CLP) {.smaller}

Updated to 2026 Chilean costs (`screen_costs_v3.csv`). Key changes:

| Procedure | v2 | v3 | Change |
|---|---:|---:|---:|
| FIT | 14,220 | 21,510 | +51% |
| SIG | 77,100 | 118,064 | +53% |
| Screening colonoscopy (no polypectomy) | 121,664 | 181,271 | +49% |
| Diagnostic colonoscopy (no polypectomy) | 105,885 | 157,762 | +49% |
| Surveillance colonoscopy (no polypectomy) | 119,993 | 178,781 | +49% |
| Colonoscopy with polypectomy | 144,028 | 426,078 | +196% |
| Fatal perforation | 1,134,170 | 3,355,203 | +196% |
| Serious GI complication | 1,134,170 | 3,355,203 | +196% |
| Other GI complication | 808,045 | 2,390,433 | +196% |
| Cardiovascular complication | 885,641 | 2,619,984 | +196% |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Cost-Effectiveness — All Strategies (v2 vs v3) {.smaller}

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}

**Costs v2**

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(gt)
wtp <- 16e6
df_v2 <- read.csv("../ce_results/df_icer_all_strategies_v2.csv")
df_v3 <- read.csv("../ce_results/df_icer_all_strategies.csv")
nd_strategies <- union(
  df_v2$Strategy[df_v2$Status == "ND"],
  df_v3$Strategy[df_v3$Status == "ND"]
)
df_show <- df_v2[df_v2$Strategy %in% nd_strategies, c("Strategy", "Cost", "Effect", "ICER", "Status")]
df_show <- df_show[order(df_show$Cost), ]
df_show$Cost <- df_show$Cost / 1e6
wtp_m <- wtp / 1e6
nd_rows <- which(df_show$Status == "ND")
optimal <- if (length(nd_rows) > 0) max(nd_rows[!is.na(df_show$ICER[nd_rows]) & df_show$ICER[nd_rows] / 1e6 <= wtp_m]) else NA
df_show$ICER <- df_show$ICER / 1e6
df_show$Status <- NULL
gt(df_show, rowname_col = "Strategy") |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(Cost), decimals = 1, suffixing = FALSE) |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(Effect), decimals = 1) |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(ICER), decimals = 2) |>
  sub_missing(missing_text = "—") |>
  cols_label(Cost = "Cost (M$)", Effect = "QALYs", ICER = "ICER (M$)") |>
  tab_header(title = "All Strategies (v2)",
             subtitle = paste0("WTP = $", wtp_m, "M per QALY")) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "#FFEB3B"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = optimal)
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "#FFEB3B"),
    locations = cells_stub(rows = optimal)
  ) |>
  tab_options(table.font.size = px(11))
```

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

**Costs v3**

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(gt)
wtp <- 16e6
df_v2 <- read.csv("../ce_results/df_icer_all_strategies_v2.csv")
df_v3 <- read.csv("../ce_results/df_icer_all_strategies.csv")
nd_strategies <- union(
  df_v2$Strategy[df_v2$Status == "ND"],
  df_v3$Strategy[df_v3$Status == "ND"]
)
df_show <- df_v3[df_v3$Strategy %in% nd_strategies, c("Strategy", "Cost", "Effect", "ICER", "Status")]
df_show <- df_show[order(df_show$Cost), ]
df_show$Cost <- df_show$Cost / 1e6
wtp_m <- wtp / 1e6
nd_rows <- which(df_show$Status == "ND")
optimal <- if (length(nd_rows) > 0) max(nd_rows[!is.na(df_show$ICER[nd_rows]) & df_show$ICER[nd_rows] / 1e6 <= wtp_m]) else NA
df_show$ICER <- df_show$ICER / 1e6
df_show$Status <- NULL
gt(df_show, rowname_col = "Strategy") |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(Cost), decimals = 1, suffixing = FALSE) |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(Effect), decimals = 1) |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(ICER), decimals = 2) |>
  sub_missing(missing_text = "—") |>
  cols_label(Cost = "Cost (M$)", Effect = "QALYs", ICER = "ICER (M$)") |>
  tab_header(title = "All Strategies (v3)",
             subtitle = paste0("WTP = $", wtp_m, "M per QALY")) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "#FFEB3B"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = optimal)
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "#FFEB3B"),
    locations = cells_stub(rows = optimal)
  ) |>
  tab_options(table.font.size = px(11))
```

:::
:::

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
![](../ce_results/plot_ce_all_strategies_v2.svg){fig-align="center" width="100%"}
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](../ce_results/plot_ce_all_strategies.svg){fig-align="center" width="100%"}
:::
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Cost-Effectiveness — FIT Strategies (v2 vs v3) {.smaller}

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}

**Costs v2**

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(gt)
wtp <- 16e6
df_v2 <- read.csv("../ce_results/df_icer_FIT_v2.csv")
df_v3 <- read.csv("../ce_results/df_icer_FIT.csv")
nd_strategies <- union(
  df_v2$Strategy[df_v2$Status == "ND"],
  df_v3$Strategy[df_v3$Status == "ND"]
)
df_show <- df_v2[df_v2$Strategy %in% nd_strategies, c("Strategy", "Cost", "Effect", "ICER", "Status")]
df_show <- df_show[order(df_show$Cost), ]
df_show$Cost <- df_show$Cost / 1e6
wtp_m <- wtp / 1e6
nd_rows <- which(df_show$Status == "ND")
optimal <- if (length(nd_rows) > 0) max(nd_rows[!is.na(df_show$ICER[nd_rows]) & df_show$ICER[nd_rows] / 1e6 <= wtp_m]) else NA
df_show$ICER <- df_show$ICER / 1e6
df_show$Status <- NULL
gt(df_show, rowname_col = "Strategy") |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(Cost), decimals = 1, suffixing = FALSE) |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(Effect), decimals = 1) |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(ICER), decimals = 2) |>
  sub_missing(missing_text = "—") |>
  cols_label(Cost = "Cost (M$)", Effect = "QALYs", ICER = "ICER (M$)") |>
  tab_header(title = "FIT Strategies (v2)",
             subtitle = paste0("WTP = $", wtp_m, "M per QALY")) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "#FFEB3B"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = optimal)
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "#FFEB3B"),
    locations = cells_stub(rows = optimal)
  ) |>
  tab_options(table.font.size = px(11))
```

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

**Costs v3**

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(gt)
wtp <- 16e6
df_v2 <- read.csv("../ce_results/df_icer_FIT_v2.csv")
df_v3 <- read.csv("../ce_results/df_icer_FIT.csv")
nd_strategies <- union(
  df_v2$Strategy[df_v2$Status == "ND"],
  df_v3$Strategy[df_v3$Status == "ND"]
)
df_show <- df_v3[df_v3$Strategy %in% nd_strategies, c("Strategy", "Cost", "Effect", "ICER", "Status")]
df_show <- df_show[order(df_show$Cost), ]
df_show$Cost <- df_show$Cost / 1e6
wtp_m <- wtp / 1e6
nd_rows <- which(df_show$Status == "ND")
optimal <- if (length(nd_rows) > 0) max(nd_rows[!is.na(df_show$ICER[nd_rows]) & df_show$ICER[nd_rows] / 1e6 <= wtp_m]) else NA
df_show$ICER <- df_show$ICER / 1e6
df_show$Status <- NULL
gt(df_show, rowname_col = "Strategy") |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(Cost), decimals = 1, suffixing = FALSE) |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(Effect), decimals = 1) |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(ICER), decimals = 2) |>
  sub_missing(missing_text = "—") |>
  cols_label(Cost = "Cost (M$)", Effect = "QALYs", ICER = "ICER (M$)") |>
  tab_header(title = "FIT Strategies (v3)",
             subtitle = paste0("WTP = $", wtp_m, "M per QALY")) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "#FFEB3B"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = optimal)
  ) |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "#FFEB3B"),
    locations = cells_stub(rows = optimal)
  ) |>
  tab_options(table.font.size = px(11))
```

:::
:::

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
![](../ce_results/plot_ce_FIT_v2.svg){fig-align="center" width="100%"}
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![](../ce_results/plot_ce_FIT.svg){fig-align="center" width="100%"}
:::
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Cost Breakdown by Component — v2 vs v3 {.smaller}

*cost = **events × unit price**. FIT: 14,220→21,510 CLP (+51%). Colonoscopy w/ polypectomy: 144,028→426,078 CLP (+196%). Cancer care: unchanged. FIT + COL + Compl + Cancer care = **Total\*** (undiscounted). Dampack discounts Total\* at 3%/yr → **Disc. total** (= "Cost" in ICER tables). Yellow = optimal at WTP $16M.*

**All strategies**

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(gt); library(readxl); library(dplyr)
wtp_m <- 16
f_mrd_v2 <- "../ce_results/2026-04-08 141620.826308_model_run_data_Base.xlsx"
df_mrd   <- read_excel(f_mrd_v2, sheet = "model_run_data") |>
  mutate(Strategy = gsub("^2026Chile_", "", Strategy))
df_iv2   <- read.csv("../ce_results/df_icer_all_strategies_v2.csv")
df_iv3   <- read.csv("../ce_results/df_icer_all_strategies.csv")
nd_strat <- union(df_iv2$Strategy[df_iv2$Status == "ND"],
                  df_iv3$Strategy[df_iv3$Status == "ND"])
df_show  <- df_mrd |>
  filter(Strategy %in% nd_strat) |>
  left_join(df_iv2 |> select(Strategy, Cost, ICER, Status), by = "Strategy") |>
  arrange(Cost) |>
  transmute(Strategy,
            n_FIT      = FITper1000,
            FIT        = FIT_costsper1000               / 1e6,
            n_COL      = Colonoscopiesper1000,
            COL        = COL_costsper1000               / 1e6,
            Compl      = Complication_costsper1000       / 1e6,
            Care       = CostsCancerCareper1000          / 1e6,
            Total      = TotalCostsper1000               / 1e6,
            Disc_Total = DiscountedTotalCostsper1000     / 1e6,
            ICER_M     = ICER / 1e6, Status)
nd_rows <- which(df_show$Status == "ND")
optimal <- if (length(nd_rows) > 0)
  max(nd_rows[!is.na(df_show$ICER_M[nd_rows]) & df_show$ICER_M[nd_rows] <= wtp_m]) else NA
gt(df_show |> select(-Status), rowname_col = "Strategy") |>
  tab_header(title = "All strategies — v2") |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(n_FIT, n_COL), decimals = 0) |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(FIT, COL, Compl, Care, Total, Disc_Total), decimals = 1) |>
  fmt_number(columns = ICER_M, decimals = 2) |>
  sub_missing(missing_text = "—") |>
  cols_label(n_FIT = "FIT tests/1k", FIT = "FIT cost (M$)",
             n_COL = "COL/1k",       COL = "COL cost (M$)",
             Compl = "Compl (M$)",   Care = "Cancer care (M$)",
             Total = "Total* (M$)",  Disc_Total = "Disc. total (M$)",
             ICER_M = "ICER (M$)") |>
  tab_style(style = cell_fill(color = "#F0F9FF"),
            locations = cells_body(columns = c(n_FIT, n_COL))) |>
  tab_style(style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
            locations = cells_body(columns = c(Total, Disc_Total))) |>
  tab_style(style = cell_fill(color = "#EFF6FF"),
            locations = cells_body(columns = Disc_Total)) |>
  tab_style(style = cell_fill(color = "#FFEB3B"), locations = cells_body(rows = optimal)) |>
  tab_style(style = cell_fill(color = "#FFEB3B"), locations = cells_stub(rows = optimal)) |>
  tab_options(table.font.size = px(9))
```

:::
::: {.column width="50%"}

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(gt); library(readxl); library(dplyr)
wtp_m <- 16
f_mrd_v3 <- "../ce_results/2026-05-09 142958.018178_model_run_data_Base.xlsx"
df_mrd   <- read_excel(f_mrd_v3, sheet = "model_run_data") |>
  mutate(Strategy = gsub("^2026Chile_", "", Strategy))
df_iv2   <- read.csv("../ce_results/df_icer_all_strategies_v2.csv")
df_iv3   <- read.csv("../ce_results/df_icer_all_strategies.csv")
nd_strat <- union(df_iv2$Strategy[df_iv2$Status == "ND"],
                  df_iv3$Strategy[df_iv3$Status == "ND"])
df_show  <- df_mrd |>
  filter(Strategy %in% nd_strat) |>
  left_join(df_iv3 |> select(Strategy, Cost, ICER, Status), by = "Strategy") |>
  arrange(Cost) |>
  transmute(Strategy,
            n_FIT      = FITper1000,
            FIT        = FIT_costsper1000               / 1e6,
            n_COL      = Colonoscopiesper1000,
            COL        = COL_costsper1000               / 1e6,
            Compl      = Complication_costsper1000       / 1e6,
            Care       = CostsCancerCareper1000          / 1e6,
            Total      = TotalCostsper1000               / 1e6,
            Disc_Total = DiscountedTotalCostsper1000     / 1e6,
            ICER_M     = ICER / 1e6, Status)
nd_rows <- which(df_show$Status == "ND")
optimal <- if (length(nd_rows) > 0)
  max(nd_rows[!is.na(df_show$ICER_M[nd_rows]) & df_show$ICER_M[nd_rows] <= wtp_m]) else NA
gt(df_show |> select(-Status), rowname_col = "Strategy") |>
  tab_header(title = "All strategies — v3") |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(n_FIT, n_COL), decimals = 0) |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(FIT, COL, Compl, Care, Total, Disc_Total), decimals = 1) |>
  fmt_number(columns = ICER_M, decimals = 2) |>
  sub_missing(missing_text = "—") |>
  cols_label(n_FIT = "FIT tests/1k", FIT = "FIT cost (M$)",
             n_COL = "COL/1k",       COL = "COL cost (M$)",
             Compl = "Compl (M$)",   Care = "Cancer care (M$)",
             Total = "Total* (M$)",  Disc_Total = "Disc. total (M$)",
             ICER_M = "ICER (M$)") |>
  tab_style(style = cell_fill(color = "#F0F9FF"),
            locations = cells_body(columns = c(n_FIT, n_COL))) |>
  tab_style(style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
            locations = cells_body(columns = c(Total, Disc_Total))) |>
  tab_style(style = cell_fill(color = "#EFF6FF"),
            locations = cells_body(columns = Disc_Total)) |>
  tab_style(style = cell_fill(color = "#FFEB3B"), locations = cells_body(rows = optimal)) |>
  tab_style(style = cell_fill(color = "#FFEB3B"), locations = cells_stub(rows = optimal)) |>
  tab_options(table.font.size = px(9))
```

:::
:::

**FIT strategies only**

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(gt); library(readxl); library(dplyr)
wtp_m <- 16
f_mrd_v2 <- "../ce_results/2026-04-08 141620.826308_model_run_data_Base.xlsx"
df_mrd   <- read_excel(f_mrd_v2, sheet = "model_run_data") |>
  mutate(Strategy = gsub("^2026Chile_", "", Strategy))
df_iv2   <- read.csv("../ce_results/df_icer_FIT_v2.csv")
df_iv3   <- read.csv("../ce_results/df_icer_FIT.csv")
nd_strat <- union(df_iv2$Strategy[df_iv2$Status == "ND"],
                  df_iv3$Strategy[df_iv3$Status == "ND"])
df_show  <- df_mrd |>
  filter(Strategy %in% nd_strat) |>
  left_join(df_iv2 |> select(Strategy, Cost, ICER, Status), by = "Strategy") |>
  arrange(Cost) |>
  transmute(Strategy,
            n_FIT      = FITper1000,
            FIT        = FIT_costsper1000               / 1e6,
            n_COL      = Colonoscopiesper1000,
            COL        = COL_costsper1000               / 1e6,
            Compl      = Complication_costsper1000       / 1e6,
            Care       = CostsCancerCareper1000          / 1e6,
            Total      = TotalCostsper1000               / 1e6,
            Disc_Total = DiscountedTotalCostsper1000     / 1e6,
            ICER_M     = ICER / 1e6, Status)
nd_rows <- which(df_show$Status == "ND")
optimal <- if (length(nd_rows) > 0)
  max(nd_rows[!is.na(df_show$ICER_M[nd_rows]) & df_show$ICER_M[nd_rows] <= wtp_m]) else NA
gt(df_show |> select(-Status), rowname_col = "Strategy") |>
  tab_header(title = "FIT only — v2") |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(n_FIT, n_COL), decimals = 0) |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(FIT, COL, Compl, Care, Total, Disc_Total), decimals = 1) |>
  fmt_number(columns = ICER_M, decimals = 2) |>
  sub_missing(missing_text = "—") |>
  cols_label(n_FIT = "FIT tests/1k", FIT = "FIT cost (M$)",
             n_COL = "COL/1k",       COL = "COL cost (M$)",
             Compl = "Compl (M$)",   Care = "Cancer care (M$)",
             Total = "Total* (M$)",  Disc_Total = "Disc. total (M$)",
             ICER_M = "ICER (M$)") |>
  tab_style(style = cell_fill(color = "#F0F9FF"),
            locations = cells_body(columns = c(n_FIT, n_COL))) |>
  tab_style(style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
            locations = cells_body(columns = c(Total, Disc_Total))) |>
  tab_style(style = cell_fill(color = "#EFF6FF"),
            locations = cells_body(columns = Disc_Total)) |>
  tab_style(style = cell_fill(color = "#FFEB3B"), locations = cells_body(rows = optimal)) |>
  tab_style(style = cell_fill(color = "#FFEB3B"), locations = cells_stub(rows = optimal)) |>
  tab_options(table.font.size = px(9))
```

:::
::: {.column width="50%"}

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(gt); library(readxl); library(dplyr)
wtp_m <- 16
f_mrd_v3 <- "../ce_results/2026-05-09 142958.018178_model_run_data_Base.xlsx"
df_mrd   <- read_excel(f_mrd_v3, sheet = "model_run_data") |>
  mutate(Strategy = gsub("^2026Chile_", "", Strategy))
df_iv2   <- read.csv("../ce_results/df_icer_FIT_v2.csv")
df_iv3   <- read.csv("../ce_results/df_icer_FIT.csv")
nd_strat <- union(df_iv2$Strategy[df_iv2$Status == "ND"],
                  df_iv3$Strategy[df_iv3$Status == "ND"])
df_show  <- df_mrd |>
  filter(Strategy %in% nd_strat) |>
  left_join(df_iv3 |> select(Strategy, Cost, ICER, Status), by = "Strategy") |>
  arrange(Cost) |>
  transmute(Strategy,
            n_FIT      = FITper1000,
            FIT        = FIT_costsper1000               / 1e6,
            n_COL      = Colonoscopiesper1000,
            COL        = COL_costsper1000               / 1e6,
            Compl      = Complication_costsper1000       / 1e6,
            Care       = CostsCancerCareper1000          / 1e6,
            Total      = TotalCostsper1000               / 1e6,
            Disc_Total = DiscountedTotalCostsper1000     / 1e6,
            ICER_M     = ICER / 1e6, Status)
nd_rows <- which(df_show$Status == "ND")
optimal <- if (length(nd_rows) > 0)
  max(nd_rows[!is.na(df_show$ICER_M[nd_rows]) & df_show$ICER_M[nd_rows] <= wtp_m]) else NA
gt(df_show |> select(-Status), rowname_col = "Strategy") |>
  tab_header(title = "FIT only — v3") |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(n_FIT, n_COL), decimals = 0) |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(FIT, COL, Compl, Care, Total, Disc_Total), decimals = 1) |>
  fmt_number(columns = ICER_M, decimals = 2) |>
  sub_missing(missing_text = "—") |>
  cols_label(n_FIT = "FIT tests/1k", FIT = "FIT cost (M$)",
             n_COL = "COL/1k",       COL = "COL cost (M$)",
             Compl = "Compl (M$)",   Care = "Cancer care (M$)",
             Total = "Total* (M$)",  Disc_Total = "Disc. total (M$)",
             ICER_M = "ICER (M$)") |>
  tab_style(style = cell_fill(color = "#F0F9FF"),
            locations = cells_body(columns = c(n_FIT, n_COL))) |>
  tab_style(style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
            locations = cells_body(columns = c(Total, Disc_Total))) |>
  tab_style(style = cell_fill(color = "#EFF6FF"),
            locations = cells_body(columns = Disc_Total)) |>
  tab_style(style = cell_fill(color = "#FFEB3B"), locations = cells_body(rows = optimal)) |>
  tab_style(style = cell_fill(color = "#FFEB3B"), locations = cells_stub(rows = optimal)) |>
  tab_options(table.font.size = px(9))
```

:::
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## What Drives the v2 → v3 Cost Increase? {.smaller}

*Δ Total = Δ FIT + Δ COL + Δ Compl + Δ Cancer care. Effective COL price +116% (not +196%) because ~40% of colonoscopies yield polypectomy (+196%) and ~60% do not (+49%). Cancer care barely changes — it depends on stage at detection, not unit prices.*

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
library(gt); library(readxl); library(dplyr); library(tidyr); library(stringr); library(ggplot2)
f_v2 <- "../ce_results/2026-04-08 141620.826308_model_run_data_Base.xlsx"
f_v3 <- "../ce_results/2026-05-09 142958.018178_model_run_data_Base.xlsx"
v_cols <- c("Strategy","FITper1000","Colonoscopiesper1000",
            "FIT_costsper1000","COL_costsper1000",
            "Complication_costsper1000","CostsCancerCareper1000","TotalCostsper1000")
clean <- function(f) read_excel(f, sheet="model_run_data") |>
  mutate(Strategy = str_remove(Strategy, "^2026Chile_")) |> select(all_of(v_cols))
nd_fit <- union(
  read.csv("../ce_results/df_icer_FIT_v2.csv") |> filter(Status=="ND") |> pull(Strategy),
  read.csv("../ce_results/df_icer_FIT.csv")    |> filter(Status=="ND") |> pull(Strategy)
)
df_driver <- left_join(
  clean(f_v2) |> filter(Strategy %in% nd_fit),
  clean(f_v3) |> filter(Strategy %in% nd_fit),
  by="Strategy", suffix=c("_v2","_v3")
) |> mutate(
  d_FIT   = (FIT_costsper1000_v3          - FIT_costsper1000_v2)          / 1e6,
  d_COL   = (COL_costsper1000_v3          - COL_costsper1000_v2)          / 1e6,
  d_Compl = (Complication_costsper1000_v3 - Complication_costsper1000_v2) / 1e6,
  d_Care  = (CostsCancerCareper1000_v3    - CostsCancerCareper1000_v2)    / 1e6,
  d_Total = (TotalCostsper1000_v3         - TotalCostsper1000_v2)         / 1e6,
  pct_FIT   = d_FIT   / d_Total * 100,
  pct_COL   = d_COL   / d_Total * 100,
  pct_Compl = d_Compl / d_Total * 100,
  pct_Care  = d_Care  / d_Total * 100
) |> arrange(d_Total)
```

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}

```{r}
#| echo: false
df_driver |>
  select(Strategy, d_FIT, pct_FIT, d_COL, pct_COL, d_Compl, pct_Compl, d_Care, pct_Care, d_Total) |>
  gt(rowname_col = "Strategy") |>
  tab_spanner("FIT (+51%)",          columns = c(d_FIT,   pct_FIT))   |>
  tab_spanner("COL (+116% eff.)",    columns = c(d_COL,   pct_COL))   |>
  tab_spanner("Compl. (+196%)",      columns = c(d_Compl, pct_Compl)) |>
  tab_spanner("Cancer care (≈0%)",   columns = c(d_Care,  pct_Care))  |>
  cols_label(d_FIT="Δ M$", pct_FIT="%", d_COL="Δ M$", pct_COL="%",
             d_Compl="Δ M$", pct_Compl="%", d_Care="Δ M$", pct_Care="%",
             d_Total="Δ Total M$") |>
  fmt_number(columns=c(d_FIT,d_COL,d_Compl,d_Care,d_Total), decimals=1) |>
  fmt_number(columns=c(pct_FIT,pct_COL,pct_Compl,pct_Care), decimals=1, pattern="{x}%") |>
  tab_style(style=cell_text(weight="bold"),
            locations=cells_body(columns=c(d_COL,pct_COL,d_Total))) |>
  tab_style(style=cell_fill(color="#FEF3C7"),
            locations=cells_body(columns=c(d_COL,pct_COL))) |>
  tab_style(style=cell_fill(color="#EFF6FF"),
            locations=cells_body(columns=c(d_Care,pct_Care))) |>
  tab_source_note(md("Eff. COL price: 124K→279K CLP (+116%) — ~40% polypectomy (+196%), ~60% no polypectomy (+49%).")) |>
  tab_options(table.font.size=px(9), heading.align="left",
              column_labels.font.weight="bold")
```

:::
::: {.column width="50%"}

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| fig-width: 6
#| fig-height: 4.5
pal <- c("Colonoscopies (+116% eff.)"="#F97316", "FIT tests (+51%)"="#4E9AF1",
         "Complications (+196%)"="#E76F51", "Cancer care (unchanged)"="#94A3B8")
df_driver |>
  select(Strategy, pct_FIT, pct_COL, pct_Compl, pct_Care) |>
  pivot_longer(-Strategy, names_to="component", values_to="pct") |>
  mutate(component = recode(component,
    pct_FIT="FIT tests (+51%)", pct_COL="Colonoscopies (+116% eff.)",
    pct_Compl="Complications (+196%)", pct_Care="Cancer care (unchanged)"),
    component = factor(component, levels=rev(names(pal))),
    Strategy  = factor(Strategy, levels=df_driver$Strategy)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x=Strategy, y=pct, fill=component)) +
  geom_col(width=0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=c(25,50,75), linetype="dashed", colour="white", linewidth=0.4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=pal) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::label_percent(scale=1), breaks=c(0,25,50,75,100)) +
  labs(x=NULL, y="% of total Δ cost", fill=NULL,
       title="Cost increase drivers by strategy") +
  theme_minimal(base_size=10) +
  theme(legend.position="bottom", axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45, hjust=1),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(), panel.grid.minor=element_blank()) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(nrow=2))
```

:::
:::
